claim_text: Eos Q1 2026 release was used for revenue, gross loss, adjusted EBITDA loss, cash, backlog, 2026 revenue guidance, cube deliveries, second-line timing and Frontier Power USA announcement.
The Q1 2026 10-Q mirror was used for consolidated statements, operating cash flow, capex, cash, liabilities, preferred stock and non-cash fair value effects.
notes: Refresh against SEC primary archive if exact filing URL is needed.

claim_text: Eos Q4/FY2025 release was used as the sequential baseline for Q4 revenue, backlog, gross margin, adjusted EBITDA loss, cash balance and 2026 guidance context.
StreetInsider was used for market consensus snapshot covering Q1 EPS and revenue expectations and FY2026 revenue consensus.
notes: Treat consensus as market signal, not company fact.

claim_text: Fluence FY2026 Q2 results were used as BESS peer check for demand, backlog, order intake, gross margin and adjusted EBITDA quality.
notes: Peer evidence; not a direct EOSE operating fact.

claim_text: A full stable Q1 2026 earnings call transcript was not available in this pass, so transcript-dependent interpretation required refresh.
notes: Source gap note, not evidence for business conclusion.

claim_text: The May 2026 EOSE earnings analysis was derived from company release, 10-Q mirror, Q4 baseline, consensus snapshot and Fluence peer release.
notes: Use upstream rows for durable factual claims.
